texto: We speak, and write, in one of the most diverse, gloriously ecumenical tongues on the planet. In English, there is a word or phrase for pretty much anything we want to say, and if there isn't, we make it up, and it is welcomed into the family. We can express ourselves as complexly or as simply as we like. We can be magniloquent didacts, or we can talk plain.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jeff Deck: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “We speak, and write, in one of the most diverse, gloriously ecumenical tongues on the planet. In …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, communication, there pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.

texto: The standard clauses of the American dream only included two weeks of vacation a year.
explicacao: Citação de Jeff Deck sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “The standard clauses of the American dream only included two weeks of vacation a year.” articula motivacao, humor, sarcasm em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como sarcasm.

texto: As human beings, how do we choose to react in that instant when someone walks toward us, smiles, and begins to speak?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Jeff Deck que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “As human beings, how do we choose to react in that instant when someone walks toward us, smiles, …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, communication, human, com foco em reflexao.
